key_risks: May employment report on June 5 could trigger broad equity rotation if weaker than expected
ISM services and manufacturing releases on June 1-3 may disappoint given low consumer sentiment
Elevated inflation prints could pressure growth valuations if services data surprises hot

portfolio.rationale: Strong 7d trailing return of 4.02% and factor persistence likely to continue into jobs and ISM releases.

Q1 global chip sales surge and 3.92% 7d return position sector for continued outperformance on positive macro prints.
7.18% 7d return and software price acceleration indicate AI exposure benefits from short-term risk appetite.
2.89% 7d return provides concentrated growth tilt aligned with tech leadership into the scoring window.

portfolio_rationale: Concentrated allocation to recent momentum and AI/tech leaders to capture continuation of 7d outperformance through the June 1-5 data releases.
rationale_summary: Recent factor and sector returns plus semiconductor sales growth favor momentum and tech exposure over the one-week window ending June 5.
